zh.Heleigh Castle, Audley, Staffordshire, E: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Audley於1339年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利時，她的父親James Audley 2nd Baron Audley27歲，母親Joan de Mortimer24歲。她於1353年與Roger Hillary在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1410年在英國英格蘭享年71歲。

zh-hans.Heleigh Castle, Audley, Staffordshire, E: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Audley于1339年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利时，她的父亲James Audley 2nd Baron Audley27岁，母亲Joan de Mortimer24岁。她于1353年与Roger Hillary在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1410年在英国英格兰享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Audley was born in 1339, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, was 27 and her mother, Joan de Mortimer, was 24. She married Roger Hillary in 1353, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1410, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Audley est née en 1339, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan de Mortimer, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Hillary en 1353, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1410, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Audley 1339 in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Audley 2nd Baron Audley 27 und ihre Mutter Joan de Mortimer 24. Sie hat 1353 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Roger Hillary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1410 im Alter von 71 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Audley è nata il nel 1339 nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joan de Mortimer, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Roger Hillary nel 1353, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1410, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Audleyが1339年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで生まれた時，父James Audley 2nd Baron Audleyは27歳，母Joan de Mortimerは24歳であった。1353年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでRoger Hillaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1410年にイギリスイギリスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Audley(이)가 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Audley 2nd Baron Audley(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Mortimer(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Roger Hillary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 잉글랜드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Heleigh Castle, Audley, Staffordshire, E: Audley, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Audley nasceu em 1339, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Mortimer, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Hillary em 1353, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1410, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Audley родилась в 1339 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Audley 2nd Baron Audley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Mortimer, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Hillary в 1353 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1410 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Audley nació en 1339, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan de Mortimer, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Roger Hillary en 1353, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1410, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
